name: Tuna Quiche in Rice Crust
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook rice in water until tender, about 40 minutes.
2. Mix well with 1 beaten egg and dill. Press into a 9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 8 minutes and remove from the oven.
4. Mix tuna with lemon juice, onion, and parsley.
5. In a separate bowl, mix 2 eggs with milk and cheese.
6. Place mushrooms on the crust, add the tuna mixture.
7. Sprinkle with chopped pepper.
8. Pour milk, eggs, and cheese over the top.
9. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 minutes.
10. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake for 20-30 minutes longer.
11. Serves 8.
Recipe from "One Million Recipes CD" by Judy R.
